description: Create a Python command-line tool named `generate_tactical_map.py` that generates a visual tactical map for Bridge Command scenarios. The tool must accept a scenario directory path as a command-line argument and parse the custom INI format found in `ownship.ini` (for the Blue Own Ship) and `othership.ini` (for Red Traffic Vessels). Using `matplotlib`, generate a PNG image named `tactical_map.png` in the current working directory that plots Longitude (x) vs Latitude (y) for all vessels. Vessels must be represented as arrows indicating their heading, with their names shown as text labels next to their positions. Use the scenario at `/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/m) Portsmouth Approach Custom/` for testing and development. Your solution will be verified by running it against a different scenario to ensure it handles arbitrary inputs correctly.
